name: Crab and Shrimp Pavarotti
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces canned mushrooms, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the bread crumbs, evaporated milk, onion, parsley, hard boiled eggs, mayonnaise, garlic powder, salt, mushrooms, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, crab meat, and shrimp. Mix until well combined.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased, shallow casserole dish.
3. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
4. Sprinkle with paprika before serving.
